# LeSearch AI — Full Context for AI Agents

> Every Agent. Every Machine. One Terminal.

## Overview
LeSearch AI is an agent infrastructure platform that solves four problems no other tool covers simultaneously:
1. Secure agent setup — guided SSH hardening, agent isolation, proper credential management
2. Mobile access — control any agent from your phone, not just Claude or Codex
3. Multi-machine orchestration — SSH + VNC + Headscale VPN across all your machines
4. Subscription maximization — use every agent you already pay for, from anywhere

## The Problem
AI engineers pay $20-$200/month for multiple coding agent subscriptions (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Amp, Copilot). Most use 20-40% of capacity. Worse, they can only access agents from the machine they're installed on. There's no way to:
- Send a task to Claude Code on your laptop while you're at lunch
- Monitor what Codex is doing on your server from your phone
- See the GUI of your Raspberry Pi agent from your iPad
- Orchestrate multiple agents across multiple machines from one interface

## How It Works
1. Install: `npx lecoder-mconnect` on any machine with agents
2. Connect: Scan QR code from your phone or enter pairing code
3. Control: Send commands, approve actions, monitor progress from any device
4. Orchestrate: See all your machines and agents in one view

## Architecture
Phone/Web Client <-> Cloudflare Tunnel <-> MConnect CLI <-> Agent CLIs (Claude/Codex/Amp/Cursor/etc.)

The CLI acts as a gateway — it routes your prompts to whichever agent CLI is installed, streams responses back to your device over a secure WebSocket tunnel. Your existing subscriptions are used directly. No proxy accounts, no credential sharing, no ToS violations.

## Supported Agents
- Claude Code (Anthropic)
- Codex (OpenAI)
- Amp (Sourcegraph)
- Cursor Agent
- Droid (Factory AI)
- Gemini CLI (Google)
- GitHub Copilot
- Any CLI-based agent

## Open Source: LeCoder
LeCoder is the open-source core of LeSearch AI.
- Repository: https://github.com/aryateja2106/lecoder-mconnect
- License: MIT
- npm: lecoder-mconnect
- Components: CLI tunnel, web terminal client, iOS app, agent presets

## Pricing
- Free: 10 sessions/month, web + mobile access
- Pro ($20/mo): Unlimited sessions, priority support
- Enterprise: Custom, team collaboration, SLA

## Competitive Context
- vs Omnara (YC S25): Supports 7+ agents (not just 2), multi-machine, open source
- vs Macky: Cross-platform (not Apple-only), multi-agent, multi-machine
- vs Claude Cowork: Works with ALL agents, not just Claude
- vs Emdash (YC W26): Has mobile access, not desktop-only

## Company
- Founded by Arya Teja Rudraraju, San Francisco
- Validated at Nevermined Autonomous Business Hackathon (21+ purchases)
- Website: https://lesearch.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/aryateja2106
